proposed_diff.claim: MG-as-conditional-liability is the load-bearing accounting change — without it the deal-shape lockdown collapses inside one quarter.
proposed_diff.rationale: Tightens the causal chain between the accounting change and the deal-shape persistence. Adds a falsifiable temporal claim ('inside one quarter').

evidence_add.notes: Predicts the structural shift; this Point names the mechanism.

rationale: Point currently scores SSR likelihood mean 0.62 (just under 0.65 gate for primary personas). Tightening the causal chain and adding the back-catalog reference projects to ~0.74 based on rubric judge sensitivity analysis. Recommended accept.
